TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ayda a demiad tayda kami i sikusyu patakus.i waluway a bulad tusaabataan a demiad a milisin kami malalikid, kyu tayda kami i Sikusiw. u sakul a niyadu' kami. u tuluway a selal. makamelaw tunu heniyan maniked ku lukiyaw, talalusa' Kaku mi melaw.
S.PHON: ajda a d…ômiad tajda kami i sikusju patakus.i war~…æuwaj a bur~…æad tusaabataan a d…ômiad a mir~…æisin kami mar~…æar~…æikid, kju tajda kami i sikusiw. u sakur~…æ a nijadu î~ ° kami. u tur~…æuwaj a s…ôr~…æar~…æ. makam…ôr~…æaw tunu ƒß…ônijan manik…ôd ku r~…æukijaw, tar~…æar~…æusa î~ ° kaku mi m…ôr~…æaw.
S.FORM: Ayda a demiad tayda kami i sikusyu patakus.i waluway a bulad tusaabataan a demiad a milisin kami malalikid, kyu tayda kami i Sikusiw. u sakul a niyadu' kami. u tuluway a selal. makamelaw tunu heniyan maniked ku lukiyaw, talalusa' Kaku mi melaw.
S.PHON: ajda a d…ômiad tajda kami i sikusju patakus.i war~…æuwaj a bur~…æad tusaabataan a d…ômiad a mir~…æisin kami mar~…æar~…æikid, kju tajda kami i sikusiw. u sakur~…æ a nijadu î~ ° kami. u tur~…æuwaj a s…ôr~…æar~…æ. makam…ôr~…æaw tunu ƒß…ônijan manik…ôd ku r~…æukijaw, tar~…æar~…æusa î~ ° kaku mi m…ôr~…æaw.
